name: Quarion the Seeker

sheet.name: Quarion the Seeker
sheet.background_story:
Quarion has a lifelong passion for knowledge and heard legend of Luta and The Stalwart, so when an opportunity came to join them he hurried to offer everything he could to their cause and become a researcher.

Unfortunately, his indoctrination came from Remo, who forever tainted his perception and misguided his journey.

His enforced faith in Mother Agora caused him to join the army of Her Silence during the Battle of the Burning Church. He was one of the few to survive both portions of the war, which has affirmed his faith in Her Light.

Plunged unto the depths of The Void, forsaking faith.

description:

Unfortunately, his indoctrination came from Remo, who forever tainted his perception and misguided his journey.

His enforced faith in Mother Agora caused him to join the army of Her Silence during the Battle of the Burning Church. He was one of the few to survive both portions of the war, which has affirmed his faith in Her Light.

Plunged unto the depths of The Void, forsaking faith.
